//: OPT-IN Gmail/Calendar. Copy this to config/mcp.local.json (gitignored) to enable mail/calendar in the brief. Requires your own Google OAuth 'Desktop app' client — put GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in .env, then authorize once (README §Gmail/Calendar). The `google` server runs on demand via npx (no Docker); tools appear as mcp__google__*.
